timestamps not |\n| Facts | Yes | Subject, predicate, object |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Performance Impact",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Operation | Unencrypted | Encrypted | Overhead |\n|-----------|-------------|-----------|----------|\n| Write | 12ms | 18ms | +50% |\n| Read | 8ms | 12ms | +50% |\n| Query | 65ms | 75ms | +15% |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Rotation",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"To rotate encryption keys:"}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{"language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L14",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Key Loss"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"If you lose your encryption key, your data is unrecoverable. Store keys in a password manager, HSM, or secure key management service. There is no backdoor."}]}]]}]]}]}]]
